  "clarification_question": "For this review, should we prioritize (A) conceptual/logic critique of definitions and claims, (B) language/clarity polish, (C) structural framing and section flow, or (D) novelty/related-work positioning—please choose one or two letters?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The section introduces core constructs and mappings to markets, so the review should assess whether the conceptual framing is coherent at the paragraph level.",
    "R1.2": "Verifying internal logical consistency is critical given strong causal attributions and equivalences stated in the text.",
    "R1.6": "Clear, precise wording and consistent terminology are essential to ensure the definitions and thresholds are unambiguous.",
    "RX.1": "The review should explicitly note assumptions and limits of generality where they appear uncertain or unstated.",
    "RX.2": "Strong claims should be checked for potential overstatement and guided toward appropriately cautious phrasing.",
    "RX.3": "Keep feedback within the scope of reviewing this section without performing analysis beyond what a review entails.",
    "RX.4": "Ensure recommendations do not inadvertently encourage misleading market-facing claims or risky interpretations.",
    "RX.5": "Comments should be traceable to specific sentences or phrases and clearly indicate their provenance."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: For this review, should we prioritize (A) conceptual/logic critique of definitions and claims, (B) language/clarity polish, (C) structural framing and section flow, or (D) novelty/related-work positioning—please choose one or two letters?

rationale.R1.1: The section introduces core constructs and mappings to markets, so the review should assess whether the conceptual framing is coherent at the paragraph level.
rationale.R1.2: Verifying internal logical consistency is critical given strong causal attributions and equivalences stated in the text.
rationale.R1.6: Clear, precise wording and consistent terminology are essential to ensure the definitions and thresholds are unambiguous.
rationale.RX.1: The review should explicitly note assumptions and limits of generality where they appear uncertain or unstated.
rationale.RX.2: Strong claims should be checked for potential overstatement and guided toward appropriately cautious phrasing.
rationale.RX.3: Keep feedback within the scope of reviewing this section without performing analysis beyond what a review entails.
rationale.RX.4: Ensure recommendations do not inadvertently encourage misleading market-facing claims or risky interpretations.
rationale.RX.5: Comments should be traceable to specific sentences or phrases and clearly indicate their provenance.
